title: malus daochengensis
intro: Malus daochengensis, also known as Da Cheng Apple or Wild Apple, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malus daochengensis include its ability to help lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
